Birthday Email Promotion #2                      		                Copyright Free Template

Subject: It’s my 39th birthday and you get the gifts

Hi John, 

It’s my birthday!  

[insert some personal details, story, etc. about how you’re going to celebrate your birthday]

For the next three days, to celebrate my birthday, I’m giving you [insert deal they get when they take action]. 

This will allow you to:

Benefit bullet #1

Benefit bullet #2

Benefit bullet #3

Now remember, all this goes away on [insert date], so take action right now before this deal goes down. 

Sincerely, 

[insert name]
